sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77425" key="panh/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰν-ήρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n77425.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agreeable to all</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
